title: Speaker Cleaner
description: Speaker Cleaner is a web-based application designed to help users clean and maintain their speakers. The app provides step-by-step instructions, visual guides, and tips for safely cleaning different types of speakers, including home audio systems, car speakers, and headphones. It also includes a checklist to ensure users follow the proper cleaning process and avoid damaging their equipment.
tech: Web Audio API for analyzing speaker sound quality
Canvas API for visual guides and instructions
Local Storage for saving user progress and preferences
